title: "🚛 [Brief, descriptive title of the Feature Request]"
labels: ["feature"]

---

# 💡 Feature Request

**Summary:**  
_A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting._

---

## 📝 Problem Statement

_Describe the problem this feature would solve. Why is it needed?_  

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

_Describe the solution you'd like. Include any specific requirements or design ideas._

---

## 💦 Alternatives Considered

_List any alternative solutions or features you've considered._

---

## 📈 Impact
_Describe how this feature will improve the product or user experience._

---

## 📌 Additional Context

_Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups that help explain your request._
